svg.title: ANN Forward Propagation
svg.desc: A 3-layer ANN showing data flowing left to right: input layer with x1, x2, x3; hidden layer with 4 neurons; output layer with 1 neuron producing y-hat.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are input neurons in ANN?')
sendPrompt('What are input neurons in ANN?')
sendPrompt('What are input neurons in ANN?')
sendPrompt('What happens inside a hidden layer neuron?')
sendPrompt('What happens inside a hidden layer neuron?')
sendPrompt('What happens inside a hidden layer neuron?')
sendPrompt('What happens inside a hidden layer neuron?')
sendPrompt('What does the output neuron produce in ANN?')

svg.text: data flows left to right — this is forward propagation
